meus.empty_desc: Generate your first plan and it will appear here automatically.

home.lede: Tell us your goal, level and available time. In seconds, AI builds a full plan with sets, reps and rest.

features.personalized_desc: Tailored to your level, goal and available equipment.
features.fast_desc: Ready in seconds — stop improvising at the gym.
features.structured_desc: Sets, reps, rest, warm-up and stretching.

home.cta_strip_lede: Takes less than a minute. No signup needed.

sobre.intro: Forja is a workout builder that uses artificial intelligence to create personalized plans in seconds. You answer a few questions about your profile, goal and available time — and get a structured workout with sets, reps, rest, warm-up and stretching.
sobre.step1: Tell us your profile: age, sex, level and goal.
sobre.step2: Say where you train, how many days per week and how long per session.
sobre.step3: AI builds your plan — print it, copy it or start over.
sobre.warn: Forja generates workout suggestions. Before starting any exercise program, consult a health professional, especially if you have injuries or medical conditions.

login.lede: Sign in with your Google account to generate your personalized workout plan.
login.error_generic: Couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

gerar.title: Let's build your workout
gerar.f_goal: What do you want to achieve?
gerar.f_restrictions_placeholder: e.g., lower back pain, avoid back squats...
gerar.err_rate: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
gerar.err_credits: AI credits exhausted. Please add credits in the workspace.
gerar.err_generic: Couldn't generate the workout. Please try again.
gerar.err_quota: You have reached the limit of 3 workouts this month. Try again next month.
gerar.saved_auto: Workout saved automatically to My workouts
